generated_test.targeted_behavior: Select the value at a non-integral percentile rank after truncating the computed rank.

generated_test.source:
import gradebook.analytics as analytics


def test_percentile_truncates_a_negative_fractional_rank_toward_zero(monkeypatch):
    monkeypatch.setattr(analytics, "clamp_percent", float)
    assert analytics.percentile([10, 20, 30, 40], -12.5) == 10
generated_test.targeted_behavior: With a collaborator that preserves a negative fractional percentile, int() must truncate the intermediate rank toward zero; floor division instead selects the final element.

winning_test.source:
import gradebook.analytics as analytics


def test_percentile_truncates_a_negative_fractional_rank_toward_zero(monkeypatch):
    monkeypatch.setattr(analytics, "clamp_percent", float)
    assert analytics.percentile([10, 20, 30, 40], -12.5) == 10
winning_test.targeted_behavior: With a collaborator that preserves a negative fractional percentile, int() must truncate the intermediate rank toward zero; floor division instead selects the final element.
